heading: Search Before a Specific Point of Reference
body:
To search before a reference point, you must specify the reference point
in your [$search](pipe.$search) query by using the `searchBefore` option
with the token generated by `searchSequenceToken`. You can use the token
generated by `searchSequenceToken` only when you rerun the
[$search](pipe.$search) query for which `searchSequenceToken` generated
the token. The semantics (search fields and values) of the subsequent
[$search](pipe.$search) query in which you use the token must be identical
to the query for which `searchSequenceToken` generated the token.

You can use the `searchBefore` option to build a "Previous Page"
function in your application. To do this, combine the following:

- [$search](pipe.$search) stage with `searchBefore` option

- [$limit](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/limit) stage

- [toArray()](manual/reference/method/cursor.toArray) and
  `reverse()` methods.

For a demonstration of this, see the `searchBefore` query [examples](search-before-egs) on this page.
